candidate_definition_hints.text: Xterm.js is a frontend component that enables applications to bring fully-featured terminals to their users in the browser. It's used by popular projects such as [VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/) (and its forks), [Tabby](https://tabby.sh/) and [Hyper](https://hyper.is/).
